productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Grey Polo Tshirts
description: CompositionGrey shirt with contrast checked collar and cuffs, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with foldover hems, spread collar with a contrast front buttoned placket, buttoned flap pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFittingSlimWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on decorationThis easy-to-wear shirt from United Colours of Benetton adds a touch of fun and playfulness to your wardrobe. Show off your fun side with this classy piece and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with interesting denims and semi-formal shoes.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
